ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Regarding Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Jeffrey Loew for Adam Gensler (Trustee).

Mr. Loew stated that Ms. Stelliga had provided the designation of successor trustee and provided a copy to the court. The Order "Accepting Designation and Appointing Successor Trustee and Discharging Former Trustee" was signed in court.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Regarding Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Continued To Mar-24-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe for Adam Gensleri (Trustee).

Mr. Lowe reported that Ms. Stelliga had not complied with filing the appointment of successor Trustee. The Court suggested the option of filing a petition to modify the trust under 17200. The matter was continued to March 24, 2008 for status of filing the petition to modify the trust.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Maria Letora CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Hill.

First And Final Account And Report By Trustee; Request For Approval Of Accounting; And Request For Apponitment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Jan-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Keith Bartel for Adam Gensleri (Petitioner). Steve Stout for Lori Staliga.

Mr. Bartel stated that he had been waiting for months for the designation, and that he needed the trustee identified so that his client could turn over the assets. Mr. Stout stated that his client was interviewing attorneys and that he would do everything in his power to get Ms. Staliga to proceed. The Court approved the accounting. The issue regarding the successor trustee was continued to February 25, 2008. The Court stated that the matter should be resolved by February 11, 2008. Mr. Stout is to contact Mr. Bartel.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

First And Final Account And Report By Trustee; Request For Approval Of Accounting; And Request For Apponitment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Continued To Jan-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeremy Burns for Adam Gensleri (Petitioner). Steven Stout specially appearing on behalf of Laurie Stelliga.

Mr. Burns stated that he would give proper notice. The Court noted that there was no name of the successor trustee and instructed Mr. Burns to file an amended petition listing the name successor trustee, listing the names of the beneficiaries, and to give 30 days notice. The matter was continued to January 28, 2008.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mizota.

First And Final Account And Report By Trustee; Request For Approval Of Accounting; And Request For Apponitment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Continued To Nov-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
